critical.mandate: Identify coverage gaps before writing new tests
Load unit testing knowledge for the project stack

step.title: Identify Coverage Gaps
step.action: Analyze existing tests vs code paths

step.title: Load Knowledge
step.action: Load unit test patterns for the project's stack from {knowledge_path}/

step.title: Generate Tests
step.action: Write tests for uncovered code paths
Follow AAA pattern and naming conventions

step.title: Run and Validate
step.action: Execute tests, verify they pass and cover intended paths

step.title: Generate Report
step.action: Generate automation report with coverage gaps filled and test results
